classes.label: School
classes.description: An educational institution with associated administrative and contact information.

classes.label: School Campus
classes.description: A specific campus belonging to a school.

classes.label: Student
classes.description: An individual enrolled in an educational institution.
evidence: JCTB020910 入学前户口类别码

classes.label: Person
classes.description: A generic individual, often used for staff or family members.

classes.label: Staff
classes.description: An employee or official within the educational system.

classes.label: Library Resource
classes.description: A resource available in a library, such as books or periodicals.

datatype_properties.label: School Code
datatype_properties.description: Unique identifier for the school.

datatype_properties.label: School Name
datatype_properties.description: Standard Chinese name of the school, consistent with the official seal.

datatype_properties.label: School English Name
datatype_properties.description: English name of the school.

datatype_properties.label: School Address
datatype_properties.description: Detailed address of the school, down to the house number.

datatype_properties.label: School Postal Code
datatype_properties.description: Postal code of the school.

datatype_properties.label: Administrative Division Code
datatype_properties.description: Administrative division code of the school's location.

datatype_properties.label: Establishment Date
datatype_properties.description: Date the school was established.

datatype_properties.label: Anniversary Date
datatype_properties.description: School anniversary date or period.

datatype_properties.label: School Type Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the type of school operation.

datatype_properties.label: School Sponsor Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the sponsor of the school.

datatype_properties.label: Supervisory Department Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the supervisory department of the school.

datatype_properties.label: Legal Representative ID
datatype_properties.description: Employee ID of the legal representative.

datatype_properties.label: Legal Certificate Number
datatype_properties.description: Certificate number of the legal entity.

datatype_properties.label: Principal ID
datatype_properties.description: Employee ID of the principal.

datatype_properties.label: Principal Name
datatype_properties.description: Name of the principal.

datatype_properties.label: Party Secretary ID
datatype_properties.description: Employee ID of the school's CPC organization head.

datatype_properties.label: Organization Code
datatype_properties.description: Organization code of the school (8-digit entity code + 1-digit check code).

datatype_properties.label: Contact Phone
datatype_properties.description: Contact phone number of the school.

datatype_properties.label: Fax Number
datatype_properties.description: Fax number of the school.

datatype_properties.label: Email Address
datatype_properties.description: Email address of the school.

datatype_properties.label: Website URL
datatype_properties.description: Homepage URL of the school.

datatype_properties.label: Historical Evolution
datatype_properties.description: Major changes or events in the school's development.

datatype_properties.label: Campus ID
datatype_properties.description: School-assigned ID for the campus.

datatype_properties.label: Campus Name
datatype_properties.description: Name of the campus.

datatype_properties.label: Campus Address
datatype_properties.description: Address of the campus.

datatype_properties.label: Campus Postal Code
datatype_properties.description: Postal code of the campus.

datatype_properties.label: Difficulty Level Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the level of difficulty.

datatype_properties.label: Is Low Income
datatype_properties.description: Indicator of whether the student is from a low-income family.

datatype_properties.label: Pre-enrollment Household Category Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the category of household registration before enrollment.
evidence: JCTB020910 入学前户口类别码

datatype_properties.label: Local Low Income Line
datatype_properties.description: Low-income line at the place of study (unit: Yuan/month).

datatype_properties.label: Ethnicity Code
datatype_properties.description: 2-digit code for ethnicity (e.g., 01 Han, 02 Mongolian).

datatype_properties.label: Is Only Child
datatype_properties.description: Indicator of whether the person is an only child (1 Yes, 0 No).

datatype_properties.label: Family Email Address
datatype_properties.description: Email address of the family.

datatype_properties.label: Relationship Code
datatype_properties.description: Code representing the relationship.

datatype_properties.label: Position Sort Order
datatype_properties.description: Sort order of a leading cadre within the leadership group.

datatype_properties.label: Approving Unit
datatype_properties.description: Name of the superior department that approved the overseas trip and issued the approval document.

datatype_properties.label: Book Barcode
datatype_properties.description: Barcode corresponding to the book.

datatype_properties.label: Journal Barcode
datatype_properties.description: Barcode corresponding to the journal.

object_properties.label: has Campus
object_properties.description: A school has one or more campuses.

evidence: JCTB020910 入学前户口类别码
